name: Spicy Artichoke Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 can (14 oz.) artichoke hearts, drained and chopped
1 can (4 oz.) chopped green chilies, drained
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Mix all ingredients except onions and tomatoes.
Spoon into a 9-inch pie plate or quiche dish. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until lightly browned. Sprinkle with onions and tomatoes. Serve with crackers or pita bread triangles.
Makes 2 cups.
From: Steve Herrick Source: [Kraft]
